name: Hemisphere
description: Bold hemispheres clipped to an edge, re-orienting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --half: @pick(circle(50% at 50% 100%), circle(50% at 50% 0), circle(50% at 0 50%), circle(50% at 100% 50%)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 100%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: @var(--half); clip-path: @var(--half); -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
